description: Create Timecard Entry associated with the specific Project.

403.description: User does not have permission to create Timecard Entry

hours.description: Total number of hours worked (excluding breaks) for the timecard entry. This property is not required if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

lunch_time.description: The duration of the lunch break, in minutes, for the Timecard Entry. This property is only required if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

time_in.description: The start time of the Timecard Entry in ISO 8601 format. This property is only required if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

time_out.description: The stop time of the Timecard Entry in ISO 8601 format. This property is only required if the timesheet time entry is configured for start time and stop time.

billable.description: The billable status of the Timecard Entry. Must be either true or false.

date.description: The date of the Timecard Entry in ISO 8601 format.

description.description: The description of the Timecard Entry.

timecard_time_type_id.description: The ID of the Timecard Time Type corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

timesheet_id.description: The ID of the Timesheet corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

cost_code_id.description: The ID of the Cost Code corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

sub_job_id.description: The ID of the Subjob corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

location_id.description: The ID of the Location corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

login_information_id.description: The ID of the Login Information corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

party_id.description: The ID of the Party corresponding to the Timecard Entry property.

origin_id.description: The ID of the related external data.

origin_data.description: The value of the related external data.

line_item_type_id.description: The ID of the line item type corresponding to the time card entry.

custom_field_%{custom_field_definition_i.description:
Value of the custom field. The data type of the value passed in corresponds with the data_type of the Custom Field Definition.
For a lov_entry data_type the value passed in should be the ID of one ...
